description_long: This object is a tactical shotgun with a matte black finish and a compact, robust design. It features a pistol grip for enhanced control and maneuverability, and a visible pump-action fore-end with ribbed texturing for a secure grip. Along the left side of the receiver, there is a shell holder loaded with several shotgun shells, some with brass and others with red casings, providing quick access for reloading. The barrel is long and cylindrical, with a simple front sight and no visible ribbing or venting. The trigger guard is rounded and moderately sized, enclosing the trigger and providing protection. The overall construction appears to be primarily metal with some polymer components, typical of modern tactical shotguns.
description: A matte black tactical shotgun with a pistol grip, pump-action fore-end, and a side-mounted shell holder loaded with shells. The design is compact and robust, with a long barrel and a rounded trigger guard.
description_view_0: The shotgun is viewed from the muzzle end, showing the narrow profile of the barrel and the side-mounted shell holder.
description_view_1: A full left-side view reveals the pistol grip, pump-action fore-end, shell holder with shells, and the overall length of the barrel.
description_view_2: The shotgun is seen from the butt end, highlighting the pistol grip and the shell holder protruding from the side.
description_view_3: A full right-side view displays the pump-action fore-end, pistol grip, and the shell holder with shells, with clear visibility of the barrel's length.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, long cylindrical barrel with no visible ribbing or venting
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, moderately sized trigger guard with a smooth contour and no visible finger grooves or reinforcement
